sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.content: This proposal outlines a tailored digital marketing strategy designed to address your business goals and drive measurable results. Our team has analyzed your current position and identified key opportunities to accelerate growth, improve visibility, and maximize your return on investment.

sections.label: Client Goals
sections.content:
1. More inbound calls
2. Rank higher on Google Maps

sections.label: Audit Findings
sections.content:
Overall Score: 100 (Excellent)
Total Findings: 17 (0 Critical, 6 High, 8 Medium, 3 Low)
Sections Audited:

sections.label: Recommended Services
sections.content:
1. GBP Optimization
2. Google Ads Monthly Management
3. Local SEO Management
4. GBP Monthly Management
5. Google Ads Campaign Setup

sections.label: Proposed Timeline
sections.content:
Days 1–30: Onboarding, access provisioning, account setup, and initial audits.

Days 31–60: Campaign launch, baseline reporting established, initial optimizations.

Days 61–90: Performance review, strategy refinement, expansion of active workstreams.

sections.label: Terms and Conditions
sections.content: Standard terms and conditions apply. This proposal is subject to the master service agreement on file. Pricing is valid for 30 days from the proposal date. Services begin upon receipt of a signed contract and initial payment. All fees are non-refundable after campaign launch unless otherwise specified in the contract.

sections.label: Next Steps
sections.content:
1. Review this proposal and confirm service selection.
2. Sign the contract and return to your account representative.
3. Complete the onboarding intake form.
4. Provide access credentials as outlined in the access checklist.
5. Schedule your kickoff call with the team.
